title: More Tools!
description: A Minecraft Forge that adds tool sets for other materials.
body:
**Not enough tool options? Try this mod! This mod adds more tool sets to Minecraft.** A tool set is compiled of an Axe, Pickaxe, Shovel, Hoe, and Sword. **This mod adds the following tool sets:**

> Lapis tools
> 
> Copper tools
> 
> Emerald tools
> 
> Obsidian tools
> 
> Crying Obsidian tools
> 
> Amethyst tools
> 
> Quartz tools
> 
> Redstone tools

**Each of these tool sets stats have been adjusted by how hard they are to get, as well as each of their material's properties.** For example, a Lapis tool is likely to get better enchantments in an enchantment table, because Lapis is used to enchant things. Obsidian tools are stronger than Iron but weaker than Diamond, because you use a Diamond pickaxe to mine Obsidian. **To get a matching set of armor for each tool set, go download my [More Armor!](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-armor-ifamished) mod.**
